creator: raimeetravel
caption: I haven’t had an office job since 2017 😳 so this first scheme has been the most impactful in my world travel journey. Now I do all of my work on my @amd laptop and it helps me be more efficient so that I can work smarter & not harder from anywhere!! #AMDPartner

transcription.text: Welcome to unhinged frugal schemes I use to travel the world more, and my AMD laptop helped me a lot. Number one, the most important, I was super aggressive about finding a remote job so that I could work and travel from anywhere. These are the websites I use to find all four of the remote jobs that I've had, and having a lightweight laptop that actually keeps up makes this possible. This is my AMD AI-powered laptop, I bring it everywhere with me. The second thing, I would book flights at random times, just based on when I would find the cheapest ticket. That means I travel a lot in the low season and shoulder seasons, but I love it this way. And finally, I got really good at planning trips all by myself. I know I can save the most when I'm the one doing all of the research and booking. It's unhinged though because I spend so many hours doing it. This is also where a super fast laptop became a very good investment. Let me know if you need help with any of these and comment AMD to get my exact same laptop.
